summary:
Step 9 'Expected the email input to be hidden after successful login.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

Admin login did not succeed — submitting the provided email and password did not sign in to the admin area.

Observations:
- After two login attempts the page remained on the login screen showing the 'Alamat Email' and 'Kata Sandi' form.
- The email field contains 'febryanustambling54@gmail.com' and the password field appears filled, but no admin dashboard or admin menu is visible.
- No redirect or success confirmation was observed; no visible error message was shown on the page.
